title: Penug:OS
description: A silly retro operating system style GUI!
body:
About

This pack is very unfinished, but because I probably won't be working on it much, I wanted to at least have it out there so it doesn't feel like I'm never actually making progress on stuff haha The goal of the pack is to make a retro OS inspired GUI, with a bunch of silly references to old media and software.

Completion

Only a few GUI elements are actually "done": - Beacon - generic_54 (chests and such) - Hotbar + status icons - Crafting table - Tooltip - And I guess the survival inventory is quite far along
